text.title: Partner Swap Deal Template Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for Partner Swap Deal Template: scenario, traversal, draft artefact, validation outcome.

example.title: Solo consultancy application
example.code: Input scenario: a faion.net solo consultant evaluating Partner Swap Deal Template. Step 1 — gather inputs: source-of-truth + prior artefact verified accessible. Step 2 — apply core rules: each rule in 01-core-rules.xml passes; one rule flagged for remediation but not blocking. Step 3 — walk decision tree (06-decision-tree.xml): preconditions met; branch leads to a non-skip conclusion referencing the primary rule. Step 4 — draft artefact: all required fields populated; evidence cited per non-trivial field. Step 5 — validate + hand off: scripts/validate-partner-swap-deal-template.py returns OK; status set to ready_for_review.
example.note: Artefact below validates against the JSON Schema in 02-output-contract.xml. Reproduce by running `scripts/validate-partner-swap-deal-template.py --file artefact.json`.

example.title: Resulting artefact JSON
